entities.name: PEARL MILLET

entities.description: A condition of water scarcity that pearl millet can withstand

entities.description: Soil conditions lacking essential nutrients that pearl millet can tolerate

entities.description: The rate at which seeds are set in pearl millet panicles, which differs between cultivars

entities.description: The specific sequencing technology used for RNA sequencing
